scripts.preview:serve: npm run build:preview && npx serve dist-preview -p 4173
scripts.deploy: npm run build:preview && mkdir -p docs && cp dist-preview/index.html docs/index.html && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let h=fs.readFileSync('docs/index.html','utf8');h=h.replace(/type=\"module\"/g,'type=\"text/javascript\"');fs.writeFileSync('docs/index.html',h);"
